name: Country Cork Irish Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the lamb chops with salt and pepper.
2. Heat oil in a wide saucepan that can hold all chops in a single layer.
3. Brown the chops on both sides, then spoon off any melted fat.
4. Add enough water to cover the chops. Bring to a boil and add Parsley, Bay leaves, Peppercorns, Thyme, and Rosemary (enclosed in cheesecloth).
5. Lower heat and simmer for 20 minutes.
6. Peel potatoes and cut into bite-sized rounds. Chop any trimmings from the potatoes.
7. Add potatoes, potato trimmings, chopped onion, leek, cabbage, chopped celery to the chops and liquid.
8. Simmer until potatoes are tender (about 10 more minutes), adding water if needed during cooking.
9. Stir in Peas and simmer for an additional 10 minutes.
10. Correct seasoning with salt and pepper as needed.
11. Garnish with fresh Parsley before serving.
